name: HISTORICAL_TARGETPAIRS_NO_FILINGS_AFTER_YEAR_BY_ASSIGNEE
description: For an assignee, list target pairs that have historical filings but no filings after a cutoff year.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair) MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year, max(y.year) AS last_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count WHERE first_year < $year AND last_year <= $year RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year, last_year, patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair LIMIT 50;
